# Project Instructions for Copilot

This is a simple static website (HTML + CSS). Keep things lightweight and secure.

## Security Rules (always check these)
- Never add real passwords, API keys, or secret information in any file.
- Make sure no forms or inputs can be easily abused.
- Keep the site simple – no complex code that could have hidden mistakes.
- Flag anything that looks like it could send user data without permission.

## General Style
- Use clear, plain HTML and CSS.
- Make pages easy to read on phones.
- Explain any big changes in plain English.
